name: ShCh-303
events: 12 Jul 1942 ShCh-303 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 tons south-west of Porkkala, Finland. Both torpedoes missed their target.
19 Jul 1942 ShCh-303 fires a torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a merchant off Ut?, Finland. The torpedo missed its target.
20 Jul 1942 ShCh-303 torpedoed and damaged the German merchant Aldebaran (7891 GRT) south of Uto, Finland in position 59°45'N, 21°24'E.
18 Oct 1942 ShCh-303 fires two torpedoes against ' what are identified as ' a merchant of 10000 tons and a merchant of 8000 tons off Norrk?ping, Sweden. The torpedoes missed their targets.
20 Oct 1942 ShCh-303 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 8000 tons off Norrk?ping, Sweden. The torpedoes missed their target.
22 Oct 1942 ShCh-303 fires a torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a merchant off Gotska Sand?n Island, Sweden. The torpedo missed its target.
2 Nov 1942 ShCh-303 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant off Landsort, Sweden. The torpedoes missed their target.
4 Nov 1942 ShCh-303 fires three torpedoes against ' what are identified as ' a auxiliary patrol vessel and a merchant of 15000 tons off Landsort, Sweden. The torpedoes missed their targets.
5 Mar 1945 ShCh-303 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant west-south-west of Libau in position 56°18'N, 19°56'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
9 Mar 1945 ShCh-303 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Borbeck (6002 GRT) west-south-west of Libau in position 56°21'N, 20°10'E. The wreck of the Borbeck was later destroyed by Soviet aircraft.
